lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: Please... please find and dispose of those four diseased sheep as quickly as possible. Every second the risk of contamination grows! If you need some protective clothing, speak to Doctor Orbon in the chapel just north

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: of here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Some more sheep poison would be appreciated...

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: Certainly adventurer. Please hurry!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll do my best sir.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. How are you?

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: I've been better.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's wrong?

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: You may or may not be aware, but a plague has spread across West Ardougne. Now, so far, our efforts to contain it have been largely successful, for the most part.

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: However, some sheep recently escaped from a farm near the city. When they were found, we noticed that they were strangely discoloured, so we asked the mourners to examine them.

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: They believe that the sheep have become infected with the plague.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you sure it's the plague?

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: Well the mourners seemed convinced and they're the experts. Even if it's not though, the sheep are clearly diseased in some way.

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: As the councillor responsible for public health and safety here in East Ardougne, I am in charge of dealing with this problem.

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: We need someone to herd these sheep into a safe enclosure, kill them quickly and cleanly and then dispose of the remains hygienically in a special incinerator.

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: Unfortunately, nobody wants to risk catching the plague, and I am unable to find someone willing to undertake this mission for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I can do that for you.

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: You will? That is excellent news! Head to the enclosure we have set up on Farmer Brumty's land to the north of the city; the four infected sheep should still be somewhere in that vicinity.

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: Before you will be allowed to enter the enclosure, however, you must ensure you have some kind of protective clothing to prevent contagion.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I find some protective clothing then?

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: Doctor Orbon should have something suitable. You should be able to find him in the chapel just north of here.

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: Please also take this poisoned sheep feed; we believe poisoning the sheep will minimise the risk of airborne contamination, and is of course also more humane to the sheep.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How will I know which sheep are infected?

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: The poor creatures have developed strangely discoloured wool and flesh. You should have no trouble spotting them. There should be four in total.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's not a job for me.

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: I do not blame you adventurer. It is not particularly pleasant work. My problem remains however. If you know of anyone suitable please send them this way; time is of the essence.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's life for you.

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: That's what concerns me... There might not be much life around here soon.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there. I've spoken to Councillor Halgrive. He has asked me to round up your sheep and slaughter them.

lines.speaker: Farmer Brumty
lines.text: Well, I always knew someone would have to. Make sure you're careful about it; there should be a cattleprod in the barn you can use to herd up the sheep.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: Did you dispose of those infected sheep yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: You should hurry, they could infect the entire town in a matter of a few days!

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: I notice you do not appear to have your protective clothing with you. Would you care to buy some more? Same price as before.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll take it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't need any more.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: I suggest you go and retrieve your protective suit then. Trust me, you do not want to be infected.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello doctor. I need to acquire some protective clothing so that I can dispose of some diseased sheep.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: Protective clothing? I'm afraid I only have the one suit which I made myself to prevent infection from any contaminated patients I treat.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: I suppose I could sell you this one and make myself another, but it would cost you at least 100 gold so that I could afford a replacement.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll take it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oops, sorry, I don't have enough money.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: That's okay. Just don't go near those sheep. When you can find the money come back here.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: These should protect you from infection.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: You don't seem to have enough room to hold the protective suit. Come back when you do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oops, sorry, I don't have enough money.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: That's okay. Just don't go near those sheep. When you can find the money come back here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry doc, that's too much.

lines.speaker: Doctor Orbon
lines.text: I'm afraid it will cost me that much to replace. I cannot possibly sell it for less.

sections.title: Talking to Councillor Halgrive after getting the gear

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: Have you managed to find and dispose of those four sheep yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh... yeah... not quite just yet...

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: Not quite's not good enough. It is vital you catch, kill, and incinerate all four sheep as quickly as possible. Each second they are free, the risk of further contagion increases.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll get to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Farmer Brumty
lines.text: Hello adventurer. Be careful herding those sheep; I don't think they've wandered far, but if you touch them you risk getting infected.

lines.speaker: Farmer Brumty
lines.text: I suggest you use the cattleprod from the barn over there to herd them, that way you won't have to touch them directly and risk infection.

sections.title: Opening the gate without protect clothing

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It doesn't look very safe in there. I'm not going in without decent protective clothing.

sections.title: Use feed on sheep outside enclosure

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think I should kill the sheep outside the enclosure. The councillor was worried that it might spread the disease.

sections.title: Prod sheep when not wearing suit

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The sheep looks extremely unwell. I don't want to touch it without a full protective suit.

lines.speaker: [Colour] Sheep
lines.text: BAAAAA!

sections.title: Prodding the same colour sheep again
Prodding sheep already inside the enclosure
Using sheep feed on sheep inside enclosure without the protection clothing

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The sheep looks extremely unwell. I don't want to touch it without a full protective suit.

sections.title: Using sheep feed on sheep inside enclosure
Using sheep bones on the incinerator
Talking to Councillor Halgrive after burning all bones

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: Have you managed to find and dispose of those four sheep yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I have.

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: Excellent work adventurer! Please let me reimburse you the 100 gold it cost you to purchase your protective clothing.

lines.speaker: Councillor Halgrive
lines.text: And in recognition of your service to the public health of Ardougne, please accept this further 3000 coins as a reward.
